codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: legacy loader/config files are removed, old spec category names are absent from web/src, SPEC_CATEGORIES is centralized in api.ts, and vibe/build pages use shared API helpers from api.ts. TypeScript is added as a web devDependency.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The integration-worker skill currently frames agent-browser verification as required when UI is affected, but this cleanup/refactor feature was validated effectively with build/test checks only. The procedure may be overly strict for non-visual frontend refactors.

summary: Reviewed feature frontend-cleanup (commit f75179d). No code issues found against stated requirements; report marked pass, with one skill-procedure observation recorded.
